# Nicolás Cazorla Martínez

> Senior Software Engineer with 6+ years shipping software for banks, fintech, and web3. Full-stack across TypeScript, .NET, Python, and Solidity — from architecture to UX. Based in Argentina.

Canonical site: https://nicocaz.com — single-page portfolio. Also known as "NicoCaz" (GitHub/X handle). Last updated: 2026-07-10.

Nicolás Cazorla Martínez is a Senior Software Engineer currently building trading and brokerage platforms at Bull Market Brokers (LATAM retail + institutional investors). He previously led fullstack delivery for Accenture's banking clients and ran security-focused presales at WellTech. Recognized at ETHGlobal Buenos Aires 2025 (Pyth Network — Best use of Pyth Entropy) for tanly.app. Studying Computer Science Engineering at Universidad Nacional de Mar del Plata.

## Contact
- Email: nicolascazorlamartinez@gmail.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/NicoCaz
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/cazorlamartineznicolas
- Twitter/X: https://x.com/NicoCaz_

## Experience
- **Sr. Software Engineer — Bull Market Brokers** (Aug 2025–present): Trading and brokerage platforms for retail and institutional investors in LATAM. Stack: .NET, NestJS, React, TypeScript.
- **Fullstack Developer — Accenture (Banking Client)** (Oct 2023–Aug 2025): Customer-facing banking flows for a top-10 Argentine bank. Stack: .NET, Express, NestJS, React, TypeScript.
- **Presale Engineer & Cybersecurity Analyst — WellTech** (Jun 2021–Oct 2023): Technical presales for enterprise cybersecurity deals + vulnerability assessment and hardening for corporate/banking clients.
- **Project Manager & Product Owner — Freelance** (2019–present): Custom banking software for clients in Argentina and Paraguay.

## Selected projects
- **RoomXRay** (https://roomxray.com): Chrome extension detecting fake hotel reviews and ranking listings by authenticity.
- **Computo** (https://computo.app): US stocks and ETF price/earnings alert platform. Email alerts, market-hours aware, bilingual EN/ES.
- **Propimap** (https://propimap.com): SaaS CRM for real estate agents to manage leads and properties.
- **tanly.app** (https://ethglobal.com/showcase/tanly-app-dzvxr): ETHGlobal Buenos Aires 2025 award-winning project (Pyth Entropy).

## Skills
- Languages: TypeScript, C# (.NET), Python, Java, JavaScript, Solidity
- Frontend: React, Next.js, Svelte/SvelteKit
- Backend: .NET, NestJS, Express, Spring, Flask
- Data: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, SQLite
- Cloud/DevOps: AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Cloudflare
- Other: System Design, Machine Learning, Cybersecurity, Project Management

## Education
- Computer Science Engineering — Universidad Nacional de Mar del Plata (2017–present)
- Electro Mechanical Technician — Instituto Industrial Pablo Tavelli (2012–2017)

## Languages
- Spanish (native)
- English (B2, professional working proficiency)

## FAQ
- **Who is Nicolás Cazorla Martínez?** A Senior Software Engineer from Argentina specialized in fintech and banking software, currently at Bull Market Brokers.
- **What does NicoCaz build?** Trading platforms, banking flows, and indie SaaS products: RoomXRay (hotel review analysis), Computo (stock alerts), Propimap (real-estate CRM).
- **How to contact him?** Email nicolascazorlamartinez@gmail.com or via LinkedIn/X links above.
- **Is he available for freelance/consulting?** He has run freelance banking-software projects since 2019 for clients in Argentina and Paraguay — reach out by email.
